onboarding_description: Connect a Facebook Page to start managing Messenger conversations.
onboarding_consent_denied: Permission denied. Please allow the required permissions to continue.
onboarding_no_pages: No Pages found. Please create a Facebook Page first.
onboarding_error_token_expired: Your Facebook session has expired. Please try again.
onboarding_error_permission_missing: Required permissions were not granted. Please try again and allow all permissions.
onboarding_error_subscribe_failed: Failed to connect the Page. Please try again.
onboarding_error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
